architecture.summary: Extends existing improve endpoint instruct mode. LLM prompt enhanced to analyze evals. Response extended with ---EVAL_CHANGES--- section. Frontend adds eval change panel in AiEditBar. State management extends WorkspaceState.

integrations.summary: No new integrations. Reuses createLlmClient, existing PUT /evals endpoint, existing improve endpoint.

ui-ux.summary: Compact summary cards with expand. Grouped: removes, modifies, adds. Hide empty section. Mini-diff for modify changes.

performance.summary: N/A - single LLM call already exists, adding evals context increases prompt size marginally. No new performance concerns.

security.summary: N/A - local dev tool, no auth changes, no new attack surfaces.

edge-cases.summary: Partial apply failure: keep partial state, show error, no rollback. No existing evals: send empty array, LLM generates from scratch. LLM malformed response: fallback to SKILL.md-only result with no eval changes.
